title: Ubiquiti Duplexer for airFiber 11-H, High Band (AF-11-DUP-H)
description: AF-11FX-DUP-H is a frequency duplexer for 2x2 MIMO usage with airFiber 11FX-H unit. Duplexer operates in the frequency band 10.940 - 11.200GHz (low channel) and 11.440 - 11.700GHz (high channel)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Connectors N female - (2) SMA male
